event.description:
PLEASE pre-register with security for access to the venue: https://generalassemb.ly/education/sf-hadoop-users-meetup/san-francisco/15046

Here is the lineup for our August 5th SFHUG meeting!

We will have one opening presentation and then some community-proposed breakouts. Thank you to the Thomson Reuters team for hosting our food & drinks.

http://photos2.meetupstatic.com/photos/event/a/c/c/5/600_439784229.jpeg

Agenda:

6-630pm -- Networking

630-650pm -- Presentation by Mohit Jaggi from Ayasdi with Q&A

650-7pm -- Breakout sign-ups

7-730pm -- Breakouts

730-8pm -- Networking

_____________________________________________________

Presentation:

Speaker: Mohit Jaggi, Software Engineer at Ayasdi

This talk will be a brief overview of the Hadoop eco-system components in-use at Ayasdi. Be prepared to be surprised as our usage of Hadoop is atypical.

Bio: Mohit Jaggi is a software engineer with 15+ years of experience delivering market leading products in network infrastructure, security and large scale data processing. At Ayasdi he is responsible for distributed system orchestration, scalability, enterprise-readiness, data transformation, feature engineering and integration with classical machine learning.

Additional Information:

Please RSVP to this meetup so we are sure to order enough food & beverages. See you soon!
event.title: August 2015 Meetup
